version_description: Well-aligned and readable chords for the whole song / suggestions for playable voicings /.

versions.version_description: I find these chords work in an open description and follow the lyrics well. There are numerous differences to previous chords.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
          Praying For Time – George Michael
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Written by: George Michael
From: "Listen Without Prejudice Vol. 1" (1990)

Tabbed by: maguri
Tuning: Standard

capo: 1st fret
play: A
key: Bb

For chords in original key, transpose +1 (and "use flats").

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
CHORDS

[tab]        E-A-D-G-B-e
Dm/A    x-0-3-2-3-1
G/A     x-0-5-4-3-x
Bm      x-2-4-4-3-2
Bbaug   x-1-4-3-3-x
D/A     x-0-4-2-3-2
E/G#    4-x-2-1-0-0[/tab]


[tab]These voicings sound nice in the verse:
A       x-0-7-6-5-0  or x-0-2-2-2-5
Amaj7   x-0-6-6-5-0  or x-0-2-2-2-4
A7      x-0-5-6-5-0  or x-0-2-2-2-3[/tab]

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Intro]
| [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Amaj7[/ch] | [ch]A7[/ch] | [ch]Dm/A[/ch] | [ch]Dm/A[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch] |
| [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Amaj7[/ch] | [ch]A7[/ch] | [ch]Dm/A[/ch] | [ch]Dm/A[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch] |

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  These are the days of the open hand[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]A7[/ch]
They will not be the last ... look around now[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm/A[/ch]                [ch]Dm/A[/ch]    [ch]G/A[/ch]    [ [ch]A[/ch] ] 
These are the days of the beggars and the choosers[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  This is the year of the hungry man[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A7[/ch]
Whose place is in the past[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dm/A[/ch]
Hand in hand with ignorance[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm/A[/ch]  [ch]G/A[/ch] [ [ch]Bm[/ch] ]
And legitimate excuses[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                             [ch]Bbaug[/ch]
   The rich declare themselves poor[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D/A[/ch]
And most of us are not sure if we have too much[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E/G#[/ch]                                       [ [ch]Bm[/ch] ]
But we'll take our chances cause God's stopped keeping score[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                             [ch]Bbaug[/ch]
   I guess somewhere along the way[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]D/A[/ch]
He must have let us all out to play[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]E/G#[/ch]                           [ [ch]A[/ch] ]
Turned his back and all God's children crept out the back door[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  And it's hard to love, there's so much to hate[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
  Hanging on to hope[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm/A[/ch]         [ch]Dm/A[/ch]  [ch]G/A[/ch]    [ [ch]A[/ch] ]
  When there is no hope to speak of[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  And the wounded skies above [/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]A7[/ch]
Say it's much too much too late[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm/A[/ch]              [ch]Dm/A[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch]        [ [ch]A[/ch] ]
Well maybe we should all be praying for time[/tab]

[Interlude]
| [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Amaj7[/ch] | [ch]A7[/ch] | [ch]Dm/A[/ch] | [ch]Dm/A[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch] |
| [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Amaj7[/ch] | [ch]A7[/ch] | [ch]Dm/A[/ch] | [ch]Dm/A[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch] |

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                 [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  These are the days of the empty hand[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]A7[/ch]
Oh you hold on to what you can[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm/A[/ch]          [ch]Dm/A[/ch]    [ch]G/A[/ch]
And charity is a coat you wear twice a year[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  This is the year of the guilty man[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]A7[/ch]
Your television takes a stand[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dm/A[/ch]              [ch]Dm/A[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch] [ [ch]Bm[/ch] ]
And you find that what was over there is over here[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                [ch]Bbaug[/ch]
   So you scream from behind your door[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]D/A[/ch]
Say what's mine is mine and not yours[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]E/G#[/ch]
I may have too much but I'll take my chances [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E/G#[/ch]                 [ [ch]Bm[/ch] ]
Cause God's stopped keeping score[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                  [ch]Bbaug[/ch]
   And you cling to the things they sold you[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]D/A[/ch]
Did you cover your eyes when they told you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E/G#[/ch]                                             [ [ch]A[/ch] ]
That he can't come back because he has no children to come back for[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  And it's hard to love, there's so much to hate[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
  Hanging on to hope[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm/A[/ch]         [ch]Dm/A[/ch]  [ch]G/A[/ch]    [ [ch]A[/ch] ]
  When there is no hope to speak of[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  And the wounded skies above [/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]A7[/ch]
Say it's much too much too late[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm/A[/ch]              [ch]Dm/A[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch]        [ [ch]A[/ch] ]
So  maybe we should all be praying for time[/tab]

[Coda]
| [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Amaj7[/ch] | [ch]A7[/ch] | [ch]Dm/A[/ch] | [ch]Dm/A[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch] |
| [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Amaj7[/ch] | [ch]A7[/ch] | [ch]Dm/A[/ch] | [ch]Dm/A[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch]
